name: codexpet
description: A local Codex companion pet asset pack generated from the user's pixel character.

interface.shortDescription: Pixel companion pet states for Codex-style workflows.
interface.longDescription: CodexPet packages a chibi pixel-art companion character with transparent PNG states, a sprite sheet, a manifest, and a browser demo. Use it as a desktop pet, app assistant, web helper, or task feedback mascot.
defaultPrompt: Use CodexPet as my app companion.
